main_heading.title: Egyptian Governorates
main_heading.subtitle: Manage all governorates of the Arab Republic of Egypt and their associated data

table_heading.title: Manage Governorates
table_heading.subtitle: Use the table and filters below to view, edit, and manage all governorates in Egypt

visible.label: Visible Governorates
visible.subtext: Governorates currently available for student selection

not_visible.label: Hidden Governorates
not_visible.subtext: Governorates that are not currently shown to students

acceptable.label: Eligible for Admission
acceptable.subtext: Locations from which the system accepts students

not_acceptable.label: Not Eligible for Admission
not_acceptable.subtext: Locations from which the system does not accept students

total.label: Total Governorates
total.subtext: The total number of governorates in the system

add.title: Add New Governorate
add.description: Create a new governorate and define its administrative details within the system.

delete.title: Delete Confirmation
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this governorate? This action cannot be undone.

add.title: Add New Governorate
add.description: Create a new governorate and add it to the administrative structure of Egypt.

view.title: View Governorate Details
view.description: Here you can view all details related to this governorate.

edit.title: Edit Governorate
edit.description: Modify the information and details related to this governorate.
